summary: Cavallo unisex 'Life is Simple' white T-shirt in 100% pre-shrunk cotton, with logo on chest and arm and eight hoof-boot prints on the back.
Cavallo LEB 'Long Ear Boot', the first hoof boot made for donkeys, in black and sold in pairs; donkey-specific sizing D00-D5 with waterproof stitching and drainage ports for everyday use and rehab.
Cavallo gift cards in $50-$300 denominations, now purchasable only by phone; redemptions over $49.95 qualify for free shipping.
Cavallo Cooler Bag, a 6-pack-sized lightweight insulated bag for rides and events that folds up for storage.
Cavallo Windshield Ice Scraper, a durable winter scraper built for tough conditions.
April 2020 Cavallo community newsletter covering lockdown updates from Emma Massingale's miniatures, Monty Roberts, TrailMeister, and a Pure Liberty training course, with embedded video and images.
April 2023 Cavallo newsletter featuring a Pad Party Pack contest, Equine Affaire Ohio and Horse Expo Canada appearances, and laminitis presentation details.
April 2024 Cavallo newsletter on sponsoring the 2024 Liberty Festival in Kentucky (with guest Amber Marshall), the monthly boot-giveaway winner, and a message from Dr. Tomas Teskey.
November/December 2023 Cavallo holiday newsletter promoting discounted gift cards and sharing customer stories and testimonials about Cavallo boots, including a laminitic rescue mini.
February 2024 Cavallo newsletter announcing the monthly boot-giveaway winner, a Houston-to-Austin barefoot mounted-unit relay race, and a piece on rethinking stall rest.
January 2024 Cavallo newsletter with a survey to win Trek boots, equine therapy support for Tender Little Hearts, and a recap of a Hawaii barefoot/booted hoof-care event.
July/August 2023 Cavallo newsletter with a Trek Pro Facebook contest, the story of Patrick the pony mayor of Cockington and his book, and a farrier's horse-injury story.
